scripts.test:smoke: npm run clean:allure && npx playwright test --grep @smoke
scripts.test:regression: npm run clean:allure && npx playwright test --grep @regression
scripts.test:sanity: npm run clean:allure && npx playwright test --grep @sanity --headed --debug
scripts.test:general: npm run clean:allure && npx playwright test --grep @general && npm run allure
scripts.test: npm run clean:allure && npx playwright test
scripts.run:api:report: npm run apiTesting && npm run allure:report && allure open reports/report-$(ls reports | wc -l)
scripts.test:web: rimraf allure-results && npx playwright test tests/test/orange.spec.js
scripts.apiTesting: rimraf allure-results && npx playwright test tests/test/apiTesting.spec.js && node generateReport.js api
